component.name: Archive Editor
component.summary: Add anime, games, and reviews to your personal archive

description.p: Archive Editor is a small GNOME app for adding anime and game entries — with optional review pages — to the absolking-archive personal website project.

ul.li: Add anime or game entries with title, status, score, progress, and notes
Optionally write a review that becomes a routed page in App.jsx
Pick a cover image from anywhere and have it copied into the project
Validates duplicates and never partial-writes — checks pass before any edit
